meta.title: America's TINIEST fighter: The XF-85 GOBLIN
meta.description:
The United States has fielded a long list of game-changing military aircraft over the years, but not every concept is a winner… so let’s talk about the XF-85 Goblin — a teenie, tiny little fighter designed by the same firm that would later field airpower juggernauts like the F-15 Eagle.
